content:
<@304579084766412802>Hello, we need you to provide the following information🌹 

1. What is your computer system language? We suspect that it may be caused by the system language.
The backend found that you are a Russian player. You can try switching the system language to another language such as English and see if there is still this problem after switching?

2. Please provide the following two file directories after logging in to the game on your computer and encountering an exception: player.log and playr-prov.log
The file location is: C: \ Users \ 用户名 \ AppData \ LocalLow \ Morins \ 忘卻前夜

content: Is it intentional for Doresain to target 1hp immune to dmg Doll clone rather than doll herself? You can clearly see that it's impossible to do the current wave 3 with this targeting
thread_title: ✅「Answered」Doresain targeting issue
✅「Answered」Doresain targeting issue

content:
It is technically correct because it target the lowest hp unit, but in that fight is completely wasted.
This interactions make low hp targeting and characters that use random targeting almost unusable in the fight, because in normal context you at least are damaging or killing a treat, but in this the damage is completely wasted and you have little way of controlling it, particularly in the second phase.
Plus, the dying clones are completely immune to damage and debuffs, i think they should be considered Intargetable, or not a valid target at least for the hp and random targeting units.
thread_title: ✅「Answered」Doresain targeting issue

content:
Not sure if this specifically was reported, because i can't find it, but still, just to make sure. 
When you use the rewind function in some stages, like in this Dtide Wave 4 A5, even if you win, the fight doesn't end, and you are stuck forever and have to exit it.
Considering that it is a paid feature, that is a pretty big problem, hope it will get fixed fast.

content: -An option to have a random Background image and also a random Background music would be nice, even better if you could select all the background/music you like and the random only apply to these ones
thread_title: Feedback/Suggestion from a new player

content:
It's a bit of a weird request since pretty much everyone enjoyed it, but I personally had a lot more fun without it. Eyeballing the damage kind of adds a certain flavor to the game. So I would love to be able to toggle it on/off. 

It's purely preference so I don't mind if you don't put it as priority since there must be more important stuff to fix/adds. But I'd appreciate it if you guys add it. 😊
thread_title: Add the option to toggle damage indicator on/off
